title: HCP Educational Module Update — Revised Content Presentation for Safety and Efficacy Information
raw_text:
## Release Summary

The HCP-facing educational module within the medical information portal has been updated. This release revises how safety profile and efficacy information is presented to healthcare professionals accessing the educational content library.

## What Changed

### Safety Profile Section

The safety profile content display has been reorganized for improved readability. Key changes:
- The safety profile summary section now appears as a structured table with categorized information grouped by system organ class.
- Comparative safety profile data presentation has been updated to use standardized terminology aligned with current labeling.
- A new contextual footnote system links safety profile statements to the full prescribing information.

### Efficacy Data Presentation

The efficacy section has been updated to reflect current data presentation standards:
- Primary efficacy endpoints are now displayed in a dedicated summary callout at the top of the section.
- The efficacy data visualization component now renders interactive charts for time-to-event data.
- Response rate data now includes confidence intervals displayed inline.

## Intended Audience

This educational module is accessed by HCPs through the medical information portal. Content is reviewed and approved through the standard content governance process prior to publication.

## Rollout

Content is available immediately following publication. No phased rollout; update is live for all portal users.

rollout_hints.ramp: Immediate — live for all medical information portal users
rollout_hints.target_population: Healthcare professionals accessing the medical information portal educational module
